subcodes.first_line: O children of the Kingdom! Verily the Sovereign of the celestial realm hath established Himself upon the throne of the earthly dominion, and the sun of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ابناء الملکوت ان سلطان الملکوت قد استقر علی سریر الناسوت و ان شمس عوالم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @light and darkness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @quotation from or interpretation of the Bible, @The Holy Spirit, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
